Motivation
On ROCm targets with a BF16 DeepSeek model, the MLA QK layernorm path falls through to the PyTorch sequential
fallback instead of using aiter's fused kernel. The BF16 fused branch in forward_mla.py was gated by _use_aiter and
not _use_aiter_gfx95, which correctly excludes gfx950 from the

sglang.title: [KDA] Fuse gate+cumsum and reuse chunk index for KDA
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Optimize KDA kernel with fusing gate+cumsum and reusing chunk index.

Kernel-level: Fused Gate+Cumsum (2.2-2.65x)

Combines gate activation g = -exp(A_log) * softplus(raw_g + dt_bias) and chunk-local cumulative sum into a single Triton kernel, eliminating one kernel launch and one global

sglang.title: Add MambaPool kvcache offloading during retraction
sglang.author: hlu1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Mamba-hybrid models (e.g. Qwen3.5-397B-A17B) maintain SSM state (conv + temporal
buffers) in MambaPool separate from the attention KV cache. During request retraction,
only the KV cache was being saved to CPU — the Mamba state was dropped, corrupting
generation for retracted requests.
Mod

sglang.title: Update pr-test-xeon.yml cancel-in-progress config
sglang.author: MingxuZh
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Xeon CI currently uses cancel-in-progress: false, so new PR commits wait behind stale runs of the same PR on the single xeon-gnr runner (often hours).
Align with the existing XPU policy:
PR / push: cancel stale runs on the same ref → faster feedback, runner freed sooner.

sglang.title: [MUSA][19/N] Support HiCache with pin_memory allocator
sglang.author: yafengio
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
(tracked in #16565)
HiCache currently falls back to the default host allocation path on MUSA, which uses cudaHostRegister when pin_memory=True. That path is CUDA-specific and is not appropriate for MUSA.
This change aligns MUSA with the existing NPU behavior by using PyTorch's built-in pi

Pass v_head_dim to MHATokenToKVPool and MHATokenToKVPoolFP4 constructors so V-cache buffers are sized correctly for models where v_head_dim != head_dim (e.g. MiMo).

MiMo models may have v_head_dim != head_dim. Without explicitly passing v_head_dim, the KV pool falls back to head

sglang.title: Use libdevice tanh and support 2D-strided tensors in fused softcap kernel
sglang.author: cctry
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications

Replace manual exp-based tanh with libdevice.tanh in fused_softcap_kernel to fix catastrophic cancellation for small inputs (exp(2x) ≈ 1 causes precision loss  in (exp2x - 1) / (exp2x + 1))
Refactor kernel to use 2D grid (row, col) instead of flattened 1D indexing, correct

vllm.author: fergusfinn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #37897
Purpose
GptOssReasoningParser.is_reasoning_end() performs an O(n) backward scan of the entire token sequence.
This PR adds an is_reasoning_end_streaming() override — following the pattern established in #30056 for single-token parsers — that windows the scan to just the tokens that coul

vllm.author: jzakrzew
vllm.bodyExcerpt:

Route non-multiple-of-4 and non-multiple-of-16 expert counts away from the vectorized expert-offset paths in nvfp4_experts_quant to prevent out-of-bounds reads in the kernels. Use the scalar specializations for remainder cases to avoid invalid offset reads while preserving the aligned fast p

vllm.title: [Startup][UX] Enable CUDAGraph memory profiling by default
vllm.author: MatthewBonanni
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
CUDAGraph memory profiling (implemented in #30515) improves the startup UX by enabling key models (e.g. DeepSeek-R1 DP=8 EP) to boot without hitting OOM errors.
This feature was slated for default enablement in v0.21, so this PR enables it and correspondingly increases the default --gpu-memo

Remove any packages installed from github from rocm.txt e.g  fastsafetensors as it is incompatible with uv pip
Fix issue mentioned in #39378 (comment)

Using Python 3.12.

In CompressedTensorsW4A8Fp8MoEMethod.process_weights_after_loading, convert_packed_uint4b8_to_signed_int4_inplace (in-place bitwise edit) and ops.cu

vllm.title: [AMD][CI][BugFix] Override normalize_e4m3fn_to_e4m3fnuz for fnuz machines in test_moe_layer_no_parallel
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
On machines, .e.g. MI300, that use the  e4m3fnuz fp8 datatype, the moe layer that is created is already in the fnuz format.  This leads to the following assertion error:
    def normalize_e4m3fn_to_e4m3fnuz(
        weight: torch.Tensor,
        weight_scale: torch.Tensor,
        input_scal

vllm.title: [Multimodal] Add PyAV video backend for concurrent video decoding
vllm.author: jaseelmohd2
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add a PyAV-based decode path for concurrent multimodal video serving. The codec is selectable at runtime via --media-io-kwargs '{"video": {"backend": "pyav" | "opencv"}}'; default is pyav.
The existing OpenCV decoder holds the Python GIL during grab() / retrieve(), serializing video decoding

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix quantized model initialization failure with prefetch offloading
vllm.author: rishaps
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Some quantization formats store prefetch-offloaded params with integer dtypes after weight processing.
PrefetchOffloader computes param size in bytes with torch.finfo(self.dtype).bits // 8, but torch.finfo() only supports floating-point dtypes. This raises TypeError for integer dtypes and en

Purpose
Completes phase 1 (group fp8) of #35792

Adds MLAAttnFp8GroupQuantPattern for DeepSeekV3 MLA + group FP8 quant fusion

pattern match covers group fp8 flags of col_major, e8m0 and TMA alignment
Leverage existing output_scale and output_block_scale to derive group FP8 quant key


Fix pattern m

This issue was exposed after https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/38300/changes added test_dflash_speculators_model, which fails on ROCm before this PR. The default behavior of ROCM_ATTN sho

Purpose
Based on discussion with @DarkLight1337:
Introduce SpeechToTextParams dataclass that bundles all parameters consumed by get_generation_prompt() into a single object, following the same pattern as TokenizeParams for text completions.
TranscriptionRequest.build_stt_params() (and TranslationReq

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Pass effective chat template kwargs to reasoning parsers
vllm.author: BugenZhao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix a mismatch where reasoning parsers did not receive the same effective chat template kwargs as the render/tokenization path.
Previously, parser construction only used server-level default_chat_template_kwargs with request-level chat_template_kwargs. That missed kwargs derived from top-lev

vllm.author: orozery
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR extends the CPU-GPU offloading handler to support transfers with multiple KV cache groups.
